Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS sample_count, (count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(1) / CAST(count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AND bs.state = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 0 AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state = 'CO' AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/718afbf2ea088bb671428ce01530d2d95b09f895fef6496a04bd86fb60f46589/a3647af5-f307-4b29-bb85-a7b0e03209c6/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
